name: RABBIT-CAGE-22
title: plugin-change alert fires on every Stop after /reload-plugins: should fire once per change set
description: sync-check.sh compares .claude/skills/ against git merge-base HEAD main on every Stop. Once plugin files change during a session, the git diff is permanently non-empty, so the alert fires on every subsequent Stop regardless of whether the user already ran /reload-plugins. The alert should fire only when plugin files changed since the previous Stop invocation (save HEAD SHA to .rbt-last-stop-sha after each run; diff against that on next run).
